negativeCapabilities.reason: Claude Code does not expose a hook that runs before the assistant emits its final message to the user; the SessionEnd hook only observes
negativeCapabilities.evidence: claude/hooks/ contains no final-message PreToolUse equivalent; outputChannels.finalMessage = observe

negativeCapabilities.reason: Terminal output flows directly to the user; ARG can observe via output-sanitizer but cannot rewrite or block in-line
Claude Code does not surface screenshot artifacts to hooks
Commit messages are observed via PostToolUse on git invocations, not intercepted pre-commit
PR body text passes through the gh CLI tool path; ARG sees it post-hoc but cannot rewrite before publication

compensatingRestrictions: PostToolUse output is scanned for secrets (scanSecrets) and tagged as external-source for taint tracking on every tool output, including final-message-adjacent channels
F15 execution envelopes are re-verified immediately before payload-class-C and protected-branch writes regardless of pretool decision
